title: astragalus leucolobus
intro: Astragalus leucolobus, also known as white milk vetch or white astragalus, is a perennial legume plant native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as immune-boosting and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Astragalus leucolobus include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Astragalus leucolobus is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
